case_title: JANET LIM VS. SF MTA, CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $720.00 FILED BY LIM, JANET AS TO DEFENDANT SF MTA, CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-22-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIM, JANET
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-28-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-25-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE PARTIES INFORMS THE COURT THAT THEY REACHED AN AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED AT THE NEXT HEARING DATE IF THE TERMS OF THE AGREEMENT ARE MET. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DIMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. PLAINTIFF JANET LIM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SF, MTA CITY OF SAN FRANCIISCO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JOYCELYN PEREZ, LEGAL ASSISTANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PARTIES AGREED TO A SETTLEMENT AT THE NOVEMBER 28TH HEARING AND IF THE TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT WERE MET, NO APPEARANCE WAS REQUIRED AT THIS HEARING AND THAT THE MATTER WOULD BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/17/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF LIM, JANET
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SF MTA, CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT SF MTA, CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-22-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO NOV-28-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
